steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The “But” in “But El Paso surpassed all other cities” marks the turning point. The passage moves from showing Spanish-language newspapers flourished across Texas to emphasizing that El Paso outproduced all others. This signals the main purpose.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B states the main purpose directly: explaining that Spanish-language newspapers thrived in Texas and especially in El Paso during the late 1800s.

The other choices either compare to an unmentioned time period (A), claim an unsupported influence between cities (C), or discuss facts not in the passage (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
